message:
refactor(main,mux_client): extract workflow_run_policy_input helper and gate test-only dead code

main.rs: Two identical 7-line blocks constructing a PolicyInput for
WorkflowRun authorization were duplicated in the run() function (one for
named workflows, one for workflow_name path). Extracted into a shared
workflow_run_policy_input(pane_id, workflow_name) helper with a unit test
verifying the contract (ActionKind::WorkflowRun, ActorKind::Human,
PolicySurface::Workflow, correct pane and workflow ID propagation).

mux_client.rs: The mpsc_reserve_send import and pane_delta_send function
were only used in test code but compiled unconditionally, generating dead
code warnings in release builds. Added #[cfg(test)] gates to both the
import and the function definition.

Cargo.toml (frankenterm-gui): Added benchmarking 0.4.13 and k9 as
dev-dependencies for upcoming GUI benchmark and snapshot testing.

client.rs: Fixed indentation alignment on a closing parenthesis/bracket
chain (pure whitespace, no logic change).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 [[package]]

 version = "2.1.0"

 dependencies = [

@@ -120,6 +120,10 @@ windows = { workspace = true, features = [
     "Win32_UI_Shell",
 ]}

 # NOTE: Workspace lints intentionally omitted - vendored GUI code carries
 # upstream style that does not conform to our pedantic clippy profile.
 # Linting will be incrementally enabled as the code is FrankenTerm-ified.
